title: ruby security update
overview: An update for Oracle Linux is now available for Oracle Linux 10.
description:
[3.3.10-11]
- Upgrade to Ruby 3.3.10.
  Resolves: RHEL-130160
- Fix possible denial of service in resolv gem (CVE-2025-24294)
- Fix URI Credential Leakage Bypass previous fixes. (CVE-2025-61594)
- Fix REXML denial of service. (CVE-2025-58767)
  Resolves: RHEL-122028
full_text:
[3.3.10-11]
- Upgrade to Ruby 3.3.10.
  Resolves: RHEL-130160
- Fix possible denial of service in resolv gem (CVE-2025-24294)
- Fix URI Credential Leakage Bypass previous fixes. (CVE-2025-61594)
- Fix REXML denial of service. (CVE-2025-58767)
  Resolves: RHEL-122028

References:
https://linux.oracle.com/errata/ELSA-2025-23141.html
https://linux.oracle.com/cve/CVE-2025-24294.html
https://linux.oracle.com/cve/CVE-2025-58767.html
https://linux.oracle.com/cve/CVE-2025-61594.html
